item.title: The way these two cats play fight cracks me up, claws retracted and doing the most minimal punch’s possible 😂 they spend most of their day snuggling together and napping but guess they’ve got to get their kitten energy out somehow #kittens #cutecats #cats

item.title: Mr. lasagna is not a fan of the weather. Usually he’s “lurking” around, kinda of crawling. His belly trying to find places to hide. #storms #cats #funny #cattok #pets

item.title: I saw Tuck twice a day for 4 days this past weekend and if you’ve been following me for awhile, you know Tuck deals with me being his stand-in human with big “you’re not my mom” hisses - but this little stretch of visits had a few thrown in surprise greet
